title: FOGBOUND
description: Descend into a world where darkness isn’t just absence—it’s alive. True fear, sinister caves, haunting sounds, and creeping horrors await every step you take.
body:
Fogbound plunges you into a terrifying new way to play Minecraft. With mods like True Darkness Refabricated, AmbientSounds, Deeper and Darker, From the Fog, and Cave Dweller Evolved, every cave, forest, and shadow hides something sinister.

🔦 What does it add?

Immersive dynamic lighting with LambDynamicLights

Creepy ambient audio with AmbientSounds

New biomes, structures, and horrors from Deeper and Darker

Stalkers and monsters like the Cave Dweller and The Man from the Fog

Enhanced visuals with Insanity Shader and performance boosts via Sodium

👻 What features does it have?

Oppressive darkness where light is your only ally

Terrifying ambient noises and whispers in the fog

Unique creatures and bosses that hunt you

A performance-friendly horror experience on Fabric 1.20.1

🔥 Why download?
Because Fogbound isn’t just Minecraft—it’s survival horror. Every torch matters, every shadow hides a secret, and every step could be your last. If you want to feel fear in Minecraft like never before, this is the pack for you.
